archimate:ApplicationService.name: Public Administration Single Window
archimate:ApplicationService.documentation:
Definition: Public Administration Single Window Service ABB is an Application that enables the processes to submit information and documents with a single entry point to fulfil all regulatory requirements.
Source: United Nations
Source reference: https://tfig.unece.org/contents/single-window-concept.htm
Example: The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Mi Carpeta Ciudadana Carpeta Ciudadana is a personal online space that facilitates your relationship with public administrations. https://carpetaciudadana.gob.es/carpeta/clave.htm
Interoperability Dimension: Behavioral IoP
LOST view: Technical view - application
Interoperability Saliency: The Public Administration Single Window Application Service ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it acts as a single entry point for the provision and exchange of data between stakeholders and public organisations. This can improve not only the user experience but interoperability due to the standardised methods for data sharing.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/PublicAdministrationSingleWindowApplicationService
ABB name: eira:PublicAdministrationSingleWindowApplicationService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/PublicAdministrationSingleWindowApplicationService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication

properties.value: Public Administration Single Window Service ABB is an Application that enables the processes to submit information and documents with a single entry point to fulfil all regulatory requirements.

The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Mi Carpeta Ciudadana Carpeta Ciudadana is a personal online space that facilitates your relationship with public administrations. https://carpetaciudadana.gob.es/carpeta/clave.htm

The Public Administration Single Window Application Service ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it acts as a single entry point for the provision and exchange of data between stakeholders and public organisations. This can improve not only the user experience but interoperability due to the standardised methods for data sharing.
